title: Kiss Me With Your Love

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: Oh, your name is like perfume in the air,
Every whisper, every stare,
Draw me close, take me there,
To the place where love is rare.
Golden sun upon your skin,
Your embrace where I begin,
Let us run where dreams are spun,
Chasing love till time is done.
Tell me where your heart will stay,
Lead me where your love won't fade,
Through the night, through the day,
I will follow, come what may.
**Kiss me with your love so deep,
Like the rivers, let it sweep,
Hold me close, don’t let me go,
Let your passion overflow.**
(Kiss me, kiss me—let your fire grow)
I am dark but shining bright,
Like the stars in endless night,
Call my name, I am yours,
Knock, I'll open every door.
Oh, my heart, it sings for you,
Every word, a love so true,
Like a garden full of bloom,
Let your fragrance fill the room.
**Kiss me with your love so deep,
Like the rivers, let it sweep,
Hold me close, don’t let me go,
Let your passion overflow.**
(Kiss me, kiss me—let your fire grow)
Kiss me, kiss me—set my soul on fire,
Love so strong, lifting me higher.
Oh, your name is like perfume in the air,
Every whisper, every stare...
Let it last, let it stay,
Let our love never fade away.

epigraph: Let him kiss me with the kisses of his mouth
lyricEyebrow: From the Book of Song of Songs
